title: 黄循财总理五一演讲：没有新加坡人会被落下
titleEn: PM Wong's May Day Rally speech: 'No Singaporean will be left behind'
summary: 新加坡总理黄循财在五一劳动节大会上表示，政府虽然无法保护每个工作岗位，但会保护每个工人；计划扩大公司培训委员会应对AI转型。
summaryEn: PM Lawrence Wong stated at the May Day Rally that while the Government cannot protect every job amid AI disruption, it will protect every worker by scaling up company training committees across sectors.
speaker: Lawrence Wong
